item.title: Dream Home Journey Continues in Episode 34
item.description: The dream home journey continues in Episode 34, following the building process and project progress. A straightforward look at the work behind the home as it moves forward. What comes next?

media:content.media:title: Dream Home Journey Continues in Episode 34
media:content.media:description: The dream home journey continues in Episode 34, following the building process and project progress. A straightforward look at the work behind the home as it moves forward. What comes next?

item.title: Common Mistakes When Building a Wall
item.description: A practical look at common mistakes made when building a wall, with a focus on construction process, tools, and careful workmanship. What details matter most on your next wall build?

media:content.media:title: Common Mistakes When Building a Wall
media:content.media:description: A practical look at common mistakes made when building a wall, with a focus on construction process, tools, and careful workmanship. What details matter most on your next wall build?

item.title: Let's Talk Footings | Nantahala Retreat Part 2
item.description: A look at the footing work for The Nantahala Retreat, with a focus on the building process and project progress. Practical site work and construction details are part of this stage. What comes next?

media:content.media:title: Let's Talk Footings | Nantahala Retreat Part 2
media:content.media:description: A look at the footing work for The Nantahala Retreat, with a focus on the building process and project progress. Practical site work and construction details are part of this stage. What comes next?

item.title: Construction of a Mega Sized Modern Home PT 45
item.description: A look at part 45 of the construction of a mega sized modern home, focused on the building process and project progress. What comes next on site?

media:content.media:title: Construction of a Mega Sized Modern Home PT 45
media:content.media:description: A look at part 45 of the construction of a mega sized modern home, focused on the building process and project progress. What comes next on site?

item.title: The Foundation of Something Special
item.description: A look at the foundation work behind a new build, with focus on the early construction process and the craftsmanship that sets the stage for the project ahead. What comes next?

media:content.media:title: The Foundation of Something Special
media:content.media:description: A look at the foundation work behind a new build, with focus on the early construction process and the craftsmanship that sets the stage for the project ahead. What comes next?

item.title: Vision Becoming Reality
item.description: Months of planning and hard work begin to pay off as key elements of the project come together. What was once an idea is now taking shape before your eyes.

media:content.media:title: Vision Becoming Reality
media:content.media:description: Months of planning and hard work begin to pay off as key elements of the project come together. What was once an idea is now taking shape before your eyes.

item.title: Construction of a Home in the Wilderness
item.description: Constructing a home in a remote wilderness setting brings unique challenges, from logistics to weather. Every step requires planning, determination, and a clear vision for the future.

media:content.media:title: Construction of a Home in the Wilderness
media:content.media:description: Constructing a home in a remote wilderness setting brings unique challenges, from logistics to weather. Every step requires planning, determination, and a clear vision for the future.

item.title: Episode 35: Building a Dream Home
item.description: The journey continues as another major chapter in the dream home build unfolds. With each milestone, the vision becomes more real and the finish line gets a little closer.

media:content.media:title: Episode 35: Building a Dream Home
media:content.media:description: The journey continues as another major chapter in the dream home build unfolds. With each milestone, the vision becomes more real and the finish line gets a little closer.

item.title: Why a Speed Square Belongs in Your Kit
item.description: Simple, versatile, and incredibly useful, the speed square is one of the most valuable tools on any job site. From marking angles to checking layouts, it helps make construction faster and more accurate.

media:content.media:title: Why a Speed Square Belongs in Your Kit
media:content.media:description: Simple, versatile, and incredibly useful, the speed square is one of the most valuable tools on any job site. From marking angles to checking layouts, it helps make construction faster and more accurate.

item.title: The Best Way To Measure Rafters
item.description: A clear and practical method for accurately measuring rafters to ensure proper fit, pitch, and roof alignment. Getting this step right makes everything else easier and more precise.

media:content.media:title: The Best Way To Measure Rafters
media:content.media:description: A clear and practical method for accurately measuring rafters to ensure proper fit, pitch, and roof alignment. Getting this step right makes everything else easier and more precise.

item.title: Tips and Tricks: Porch Roof Edition
item.description: Practical tips and field-tested tricks for building and improving porch roofs, focusing on cleaner installs, better alignment, and fewer mistakes on site.

media:content.media:title: Tips and Tricks: Porch Roof Edition
media:content.media:description: Practical tips and field-tested tricks for building and improving porch roofs, focusing on cleaner installs, better alignment, and fewer mistakes on site.

item.title: I thought this was IMPOSSIBLE!
item.description: A challenging moment turns into a breakthrough as something that seemed impossible finally gets figured out. With the right approach and a bit of problem-solving, even the toughest tasks start to make sense.

media:content.media:title: I thought this was IMPOSSIBLE!
media:content.media:description: A challenging moment turns into a breakthrough as something that seemed impossible finally gets figured out. With the right approach and a bit of problem-solving, even the toughest tasks start to make sense.
